evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const out={ext:!!window.ExtensorHorario,seg:!!window.SeguridadSystem};if(window.ExtensorHorario){try{ExtensorHorario.abrir({app:'warehouseMos',deviceId:'__harness__',onSuccess:function(){}});await w(700);var m=document.getElementById('extHorarioModal');var html=m?m.innerHTML:'';out.modal={abierto:!!m,tiene1hora:/1 hora/.test(html),tiene20min:/20 min/.test(html),tiene2horas:/2 horas/.test(html),tieneClave:/Clave admin/.test(html)};if(ExtensorHorario.cerrar)ExtensorHorario.cerrar();}catch(e){out.modal='ERR:'+e.message;}}return out;})()
